description: Style Notemother earth's focus on providing livelihoods for rural artisans resulted in this handmade kurta that fuses earthy goodness with a modern cut and silhouette. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings and embellished slippers. Product DetailsRed printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a split neckline, chest fabric button placket, short sleeves, contrast panelling and stitched detailing on the chest, contrast piping on the hem and cuffs and a curved hem Material and Care100% cottonHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not soakCertain fabrics will shrink Size and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
